title: Implement WebSocket for real-time updates
original_text: Implemented WebSocket support for real-time updates. Added WebSocket server using Socket.IO. Created real-time notification system for user events. Implemented live chat functionality. Added presence tracking to show online users. Implemented reconnection logic for network interruptions. Added message queuing for offline delivery. Updated frontend to handle WebSocket events. Added tests for WebSocket connections. Result: 42 tests pass.
expected_subject: feat(realtime): implement WebSocket for real-time updates
expected_body_lines: - Add presence tracking for online users
- Implement reconnection logic and message queuing
expected_command: git commit -m "feat(realtime): implement WebSocket for real-time updates"
